task: general representation learning on multimodal graphs
input: multimodal graphs (nodes with multimodal features, edges capturing relationships)
backbone: modality-specific encoders + graph neural network (GNN) + Mixture of Experts (MoE)
loss: cross-domain multi-graph pre-training objective (not specified in detail)
key_idea: learn a unified embedding space for multimodal graphs by combining modality-specific encoders, GNN, and MoE alignment across domains and modalities
